ns0:entry.ns0:title: PojavLauncherTeam/PojavLauncher_iOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PojavLauncherTeam/PojavLauncher_iOS
Language: objective-c
A Minecraft: Java Edition Launcher for Android and iOS based on Boardwalk. Succeeded by https://github.com/AngelAuraMC/Amethyst-iOS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SoCuul/SCInsta
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SoCuul/SCInsta
Language: objective-c
A feature-rich tweak for Instagram on iOS!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Subito-it/SBTUITestTunnel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Subito-it/SBTUITestTunnel
Language: objective-c
Enable network mocks and more in UI Tests

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tencent/lemon-cleaner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tencent/lemon-cleaner
Language: objective-c
腾讯柠檬清理是针对macOS系统专属制定的清理工具。主要功能包括重复文件和相似照片的识别、软件的定制化垃圾扫描、可视化的全盘空间分析、内存释放、浏览器隐私清理以及设备实时状态的监控等。重点聚焦清理功能，对上百款软件提供定制化的清理方案，提供专业的清理建议，帮助用户轻松完成一键式清理。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jverdi/JVFloatLabeledTextField
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jverdi/JVFloatLabeledTextField
Language: objective-c
UITextField subclass with floating labels - inspired by Matt D. Smith's design: http://dribbble.com/shots/1254439--GIF-Mobile-Form-Interaction?list=users

ns0:entry.ns0:title: objective-see/LuLu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/objective-see/LuLu
Language: objective-c
LuLu is the free open-source macOS firewall

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opa334/TrollStore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opa334/TrollStore
Language: objective-c
Jailed iOS app that can install IPAs permanently with arbitary entitlements and root helpers because it trolls Apple

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/razorpay/razorpay-pod

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/samhenrigold/LidAngleSensor
Language: objective-c
tfw when you when your lid when uhh angle your lid sensor

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/soffes/SAMKeychain
Language: objective-c
Simple Objective-C wrapper for the keychain that works on Mac and iOS

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sparkle-project/Sparkle

ns0:entry.ns0:title: square/SquarePointOfSaleSDK-iOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/square/SquarePointOfSaleSDK-iOS
Language: objective-c
A simple library for letting Point of Sale take in-store payments for your app using the Point of Sale API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: syncthing/syncthing-macos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
